description_long: This is a medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight-edged blade made of metal, likely stainless steel, featuring a slightly rounded tip. The blade is attached to a solid, rectangular handle that appears to be made of dark green plastic or composite material, secured with three visible metallic rivets. The handle is straight and flat, providing a simple, utilitarian grip without any pronounced ergonomic shaping or finger grooves. The blade has a matte, slightly textured finish, while the handle has a subtle sheen. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on either the blade or the handle. The knife is designed for general kitchen use, suitable for slicing and chopping tasks.
description: A medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight metal blade and a dark green, riveted handle. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight-edged blade and the green handle with three rivets.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rectangular profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade and handle, mirroring the first view but from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the blade's thinness and the handle's flatness.
attribute_handle_design: straight, rectangular, dark green plastic with three metal rivets, no ergonomic shaping
